title: Yet Another New Eva Box Set
display_title: Yet Another New Eva Box Set
wikitext:
[]: Yet Another New Eva Box Set             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Sep 03, 2007 1:56 am When will they ever stop? [url]http://www.animeondvd.com/forum/showtopic.php?tid/23465/[/url] Don't worry people, if you already have Platinum, this is nothing new.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Sep 03, 2007 2:08 am Wasn't ADV gonna release a "10th Aniversary" boxset with the "Kaworu Died for your Sins!" bumper stickers a while back? As far as I heard, it never came out. Really, I think they should refrain from re-releasing the series untill the next gen players like blu ray are popular enough to warrent a release of that format. There is already three versions of the boxset on DVD. Give it a rest.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Sep 03, 2007 7:29 am It never came out. After the third pushback of their release date I canceled my order for it. It was supposed to come with a Leather Jacket as well. Looks like ADV had finally given up on it now as resorted to just sending out platinum in a shiny metal box.

[]: Re: Yet Another New Eva Box Set             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Sep 03, 2007 10:14 am BrikHaus wrote: When will they ever stop?

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Sep 03, 2007 11:37 am I have that set! 8D It was originally released as exclusive to the UK, and there was a limited number of them made. I got my set in July for â‚¬110! It's a pretty cool set, actually! The case the DVDs comes in is nice, the booklet is nice and the tin is nice and compact!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Sep 03, 2007 11:38 am CitizenGeek wrote: I have that set! 8D

[]:             Quote Post by Morzella » Mon Sep 03, 2007 12:59 pm Don't worry people, if you already have Platinum, this is nothing new.

[]:             Quote Post by Evanmontegarde » Mon Sep 03, 2007 3:02 pm I know a guy who bought all the Eva DVDs individually, then one of the box set varieties, then the platinum thinpack. I guess ADV sleeps happy knowing there are people who who do that :/

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Sep 03, 2007 3:22 pm BrikHaus wrote: CitizenGeek wrote: I have that set! 8D

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Mon Sep 03, 2007 3:54 pm As a nooby to evangelion in the UK, I tried to get this set about a month back, but it turned out that only a few copies were made, so... :roll: I settled for the individual platinum DVD'S from HMV. Don't worry people, the tin set is almost exactly the same. There are no new extras/features/whatever. Only difference is the tin box and that the booklets are compiled into a single book. Here's a video: http://uk.youtube.com/watch?v=0dpt9S9vWT0

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Mon Sep 03, 2007 4:10 pm lol i bet adam and lilith arrived to earth in a metal box....and molded their bodies to fit nearby posters of humans, which were, unbeknownst to them, a pair of albino burlesque/stripper dancers of a nearby gentlemen's club. but other than that i just use the stuff on the internet. sorry anno, you have my support in spirit! which you can accept as easily as monetary support...right?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Sep 03, 2007 4:21 pm When will they ever stop?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Sep 03, 2007 4:26 pm 'Perfect', huh? Blah. Only a non-interlaced release will make me happy.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Mon Sep 03, 2007 4:30 pm Why-oh-why-oh-why couldn't they have just brought over the renewal version with english subtitles??? :cry: :cry: :cry: p.s I do actually know why, but i'm being rhetorical and depressed

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 03, 2007 5:28 pm So the metal box isn't a just UK execlusive now? And I wonder if they did give up on their 10th I mean 14th Anniversiy boxset? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Sep 03, 2007 5:49 pm So it looks like the booklet is a combination of all the booklets released with the Platinum singles. Was there ever a booklet that came with the ThinPak dvd release? If not, this might actually be a superior release (it may include other special features as well), if you don't care that the metal tin is kind of dumb looking.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Sep 04, 2007 12:59 am TheAyanamiOtaku wrote: lol i bet adam and lilith arrived to earth in a metal box....and molded their bodies to fit nearby posters of humans, which were, unbeknownst to them, a pair of albino burlesque/stripper dancers of a nearby gentlemen's club. but other than that i just use the stuff on the internet. sorry anno, you have my support in spirit! which you can accept as easily as monetary support...right?

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Tue Sep 04, 2007 9:12 am shinesman_cobalt wrote: Adam and Lilith are Optimus Prime and Megatron?

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Tue Sep 04, 2007 10:42 pm lol. who said Misato's car....WAS A CAR?!?!? that's why no matter how frucked up it gets it always seems to repair itself back together....with a new paint job oooo yeah!!

[]:             Quote Post by Shawn Dudley » Tue Sep 04, 2007 11:51 pm When will they ever stop?
